content.en:
The Dawn Sea is the territory of Xishan, a top overlord-level force, and Xishan's strength is slightly weaker than that of the Chaos Cave, but there are also several Bone Transformation Realm existences, and the strength is still quite strong.

"Xishan, maybe I can blend into this force and become a strong man, if a war really breaks out in the future, if I mix into the upper echelons of Xishan, I can also keep the human race!" Ye Tian muttered.

There is no way, the other top hegemon-level forces in the territorial sea boundary do not have much confidence, once a war breaks out, no one dares to say that they are fine.

So, he had to do some preparation.

"The potential of this replicating body is not very good, I have to give it to an ancient-level ancestor, and then become an ancient-level genius, and then join the top overlord-level force of Xishan!" Ye Tian planned.

Subsequently, he gave this replica body an ancient-level ancestral endowment, and then began to cultivate an ancient technique, the Ancient Golden Light Fist, and easily practiced this ancient technique.

However, after practicing, the bones of his body began to transform, and his cultivation decreased a lot, he was originally at the peak of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, but now he was at the point where he had just broken through to the Eight Blood Transformation Realm.

This is due to the fact that the original foundation is too weak, which leads to the fact that after becoming an primeval-level genius, the cultivation will be reduced.

Other than that.

His duplicate body is not as good as other primordial-level geniuses, after all, it was an primordial-level genius who only became after eight blood transformation realms, and the foundation in the early stage was insufficient, unless he practiced a few more primeval techniques, he could make up for the foundation.

But Ye Tian was not prepared to practice a few more primeval techniques, because if he was too demonic, the scope would be doubted.

It's best now!

this day.

Ye Tian came to Xishan as this Blood Transformation Realm creature.

"Bloodfish Tianzu is here to join Xishan!"

Ye Tian shouted.

"Another one who joined Xishan, an ordinary eight-time blood transformation realm creature, we have a lot of Xishan, the origin is unknown, we won't want it!"

A seventh-time Blood Transformation Realm creature said coldly.

He was a boundary-breaking genius, so his strength was the top among the ordinary Eight Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, so he had this arrogance.

At this moment, Ye Tian's body was filled with the aura of the Ancient Technique, which immediately surprised this boundary-breaking genius.

"Ancient Genius!"

Immediately, this boundary-breaking genius went to report.

The primeval-level genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, this combat power is much stronger than those ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures, as long as you don't encounter the existence of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Geniuses and the Bone Transformation Realm, it is almost invincible!

Such a strong person, Xishan will also attach great importance to it!

Under normal circumstances, this kind of primeval-level genius can only be cultivated by the top overlord-level forces, and with their own forces, how could they join Xishan?

But they don't have to worry about it, they just have to report it.

Rumble!!!!

A nine-stage blood transformation realm creature appeared, it was a huge ancient ape, its aura was extremely terrifying, it should be an ancient level genius.

"Elder Gu Xing!"

"Elder Gu Xing!"

"Elder Gu Xing!"

When a venerable blood transformation creature saw this ancient ape, they were extremely respectful.

"Shoot at me!"

Gu Xing ordered.

Ye Tian did not hesitate, and directly cast the Ancient Golden Light Fist and punched Gu Xing.

The power of the terrifying primeval technique was integrated into this punch, shaking the void in the gap of the Hunhe Realm, shattering the endless time and space with a single punch, and the fist power that surpassed the limit bombarded Gu Xing's body.

While!

The ancient star did not move, but the power of this punch was wiped out invisibly.

"The physical body is terrifying, at least three hundred immeasurable bones have completed the bone transformation, this ancient star elder is about to break through to the bone transformation realm, this is an ancient genius, once he breaks through to the bone transformation realm, how terrifying his strength will be!"

Ye Tian secretly exclaimed.

Of course, his true body is not bad, and his strength is not weaker than this Gu Xing Elder, and even stronger.

"It's indeed an ancient genius!" Gu Xing agreed, "Which force did you belong to?"

He guessed that Ye Tian might be an ancient-level genius of a top overlord-level force, but the gap in the Hunhe River Realm was divided, so this primordial-level genius had no help from the forces, so he might want to join Xishan.

As for why I haven't heard of Ye Tian, that's normal, maybe it's a genius cultivated in secret!

However, Ye Tian's answer made him stunned.

"Elder Gu Xing, I'm not a member of any top overlord-level force, I was originally just an ordinary eight-time blood transformation realm creature, not long ago, I was lucky enough to obtain an ancient technique, and I found that it was easy to practice, it seems to be very suitable for me!" Ye Tian explained.

"It's easy to practice the Ancient Technique!"

Gu Xing was slightly surprised, he guessed that Ye Tian should have an ancient-level ancestral endowment, and he happened to encounter an ancient technique that matched his primordial-level ancestral endowment, so he was lucky enough to practice the primeval technique and become an ancient-level genius.

"Okay, you will be a member of Xishan from now on!

Gu Xing said.

In this way, Ye Tian successfully blended into Xishan.

......

After joining Xishan, he found that Xishan had a fragment of an ancient gold tablet, on which many ancient gold inscriptions were recorded, and they were ancient gold inscriptions that he did not recognize.

"The ancient gold tablet on the Hunhe River boundary seam should be different from the ancient gold tablet on the territorial sea boundary seam, and the ancient gold inscription on the Hunhe boundary seam seems to have been broken, otherwise there would be no fragments of the ancient gold tablet in Xishan. Ye Tian guessed.

He had to admit that the strength of the Hunhe River Boundary Crack was still much stronger, even the Ancient Gold Tablet could be broken, but the territorial sea boundary Crack couldn't do it.

Subsequently, he found that there were still many ancient gold inscriptions inscribed in Xishan.

"Yes, this time you can comprehend some more Ancient Golden Texts, which is very helpful for creating the top Ancient Bone Technique!"

In addition to being able to comprehend these ancient golden texts, the resource treatment is also very good, and a lot of resources will be provided for him to practice.

And through Xishan, he also knew the strength of the Hunhe River Boundary Seam, which was even stronger than the territorial sea boundary Seam imagined.

"First improve the strength of this body, and then use the influence of this body to collect some resources, bring out the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, and improve the strength of your true body. Ye Tian muttered.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, a tenth of the primeval era passed.

At this time, Ye Tian, the Blood Fish Heavenly Ancestor's copy body, had already become a Nine Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level genius, and had been valued by Xishan, and had an extremely high place.

The Dawn Sea also has the Mixed Ruins Stone, as well as a treasure called the Mixed Dragon Blood Marrow, which is of great help to the cultivator, so he also collected a lot of Mixed Dragon Blood Marrow and sent it out.

Through these resources, Ye Tianzhen's heart refining speed has accelerated, and it won't be long before he can definitely be promoted to the extreme of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

this day.

The high-level meeting in Xishan seems to involve a big matter.

And although Ye Tian has not joined Xishan for a long time, he is very strong, and he is naturally qualified to participate in the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Geniuses.
